SELECT MAX(Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)) AS HighestEligibleFreeRate FROM frpm WHERE County Name = 'Alameda'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SchoolName, PercentEligibleFreeAges517 FROM frpm WHERE SchoolType = 'Continuation Schools' ORDER BY PercentEligibleFreeAges517 LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Zip FROM schools WHERE CDSCode IN (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE County Name = 'Fresno' AND Charter School = 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT MailStreet FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm ORDER BY FRPM Count (K-12) DESC LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone FROM schools WHERE FundingType = 'Directly funded' AND OpenDate > '2000-01-01' AND Charter = 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode IN (     SELECT cds      FROM satscores      WHERE AvgScrMath > 400 ) AND Virtual = 'P'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.SchoolName  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE sa.NumTstTakr > 500 AND s.Magnet = 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE sa.NumTstTakr = (SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr) FROM satscores WHERE NumGE1500 > 0)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(NumTstTakr) AS TotalTestTakers FROM satscores WHERE cds IN (     SELECT CDSCode     FROM frpm     ORDER BY FRPM Count (K-12) DESC     LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds  WHERE satscores.AvgScrMath > 560 AND schools.FundingType = 'Directly funded'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT f.FRPM_Count_Ages_5_17  FROM frpm f  JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds  WHERE s.AvgScrRead = (SELECT MAX(AvgScrRead) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School Code FROM frpm WHERE Enrollment (K-12) > 500	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT MAX(Percent_Eligible_Free_Ages_5_17)  FROM frpm  JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds  WHERE (satscores.NumTstTakr * 1.0 / frpm.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) > 0.3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  ORDER BY (sa.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / sa.NumTstTakr) DESC  LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT NCESSchool FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode ORDER BY f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT dname, AVG(AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.StatusType = 'Active' GROUP BY dname ORDER BY AvgReadingScore DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE s.StatusType = 'Merged'  AND s.County = 'Alameda'  AND sa.NumTstTakr < 100	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.CharterNum, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgWritingScore FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE sa.AvgScrWrite > 499 GROUP BY s.CharterNum ORDER BY AvgWritingScore DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE s.County = 'Fresno'  AND s.FundingType = 'Directly funded'  AND sa.NumTstTakr <= 250	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  ORDER BY sa.AvgScrMath DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE f.County Name = 'Amador' AND f.Low Grade = '9' AND f.High Grade = '12'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  WHERE County Name = 'Los Angeles'  AND Free Meal Count (K-12) > 500  AND FRPM Count (K-12) < 700	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, MAX(sa.NumTstTakr) AS MaxTestTakers FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.County = 'Contra Costa' GROUP BY s.School ORDER BY MaxTestTakers DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School Name, s.Street, s.City, s.Zip FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE ABS(f.Enrollment (K-12) - f.Enrollment (Ages 5-17)) > 30	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT f.School Name  FROM frpm f  JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds  WHERE f.Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12) > 0.1 AND s.NumGE1500 > 0	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.FundingType  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE s.County = 'Riverside'  GROUP BY s.School  HAVING AVG(sa.AvgScrMath) > 400	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School AS School_Name, s.Street || ', ' || s.City || ', ' || s.State || ' ' || s.Zip AS Full_Address FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE f.County Name = 'Monterey' AND f.Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17) > 800 AND f.School Type = 'High Schools (Public)'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School AS School_Name, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS Average_Writing_Score, s.Phone AS Communication_Number FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE (s.OpenDate > '1991-01-01' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01') GROUP BY s.School	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType  FROM schools s  JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode  WHERE f.FRPM Count (K-12) - f.FRPM Count (Ages 5-17) >  (SELECT AVG(f1.FRPM Count (K-12) - f1.FRPM Count (Ages 5-17))   FROM frpm f1   JOIN schools s1 ON f1.CDSCode = s1.CDSCode   WHERE s1.FundingType = 'Locally funded')	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT OpenDate  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (     SELECT CDSCode      FROM frpm      WHERE LowGrade = '1' AND HighGrade = '12'      ORDER BY Enrollment DESC      LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT City, SUM(Enrollment) AS TotalEnrollment FROM (     SELECT City, Enrollment AS Enrollment     FROM schools     JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode     WHERE LowGrade >= '1' AND HighGrade <= '12' ) GROUP BY City ORDER BY TotalEnrollment ASC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)"  FROM frpm  ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC  LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT School Name, FRPM Count (K-12) / Enrollment (K-12) AS Eligible_Free_Rate FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.SOC = '66' ORDER BY FRPM Count (K-12) DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School Name, Website FROM frpm WHERE Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17) BETWEEN 1900 AND 2000	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)  FROM frpm  WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT CDSCode                    FROM schools                    WHERE AdmFName1 = 'Kacey' AND AdmLName1 = 'Gibson')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmEmail1  FROM schools  JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode  WHERE frpm.Charter School (Y/N) = 1  ORDER BY frpm.Enrollment (K-12) ASC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.AdmFName1 || ' ' || s.AdmLName1 AS FullName FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE sa.NumGE1500 = (SELECT MAX(NumGE1500) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT Street, City, Zip, State  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds                   FROM satscores                   ORDER BY AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite                   LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Website  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles'  AND sa.NumTstTakr BETWEEN 2000 AND 3000	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(NumTstTakr) AS AverageTestTakers FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31' AND schools.County = 'Fresno'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.District = 'Fresno Unified' ORDER BY sa.AvgScrRead ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School AS School_Name, s.County AS County_Name FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.Virtual = 'P' ORDER BY sa.AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT Educational Option Type  FROM frpm  WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds                   FROM satscores                   ORDER BY AvgScrMath DESC                   LIMIT 1)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(AvgScrMath) AS AverageMathScore, s.County FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE ss.AvgScrRead + ss.AvgScrMath + ss.AvgScrWrite = (     SELECT MIN(AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite)     FROM satscores ) GROUP BY s.County	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.City, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore FROM satscores sa JOIN schools s ON sa.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE sa.NumTstTakr > 0 AND sa.NumGE1500 > 0 GROUP BY s.CDSCode ORDER BY sa.NumTstTakr DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.SchoolName, AVG(sa.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore FROM schools s JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich' GROUP BY s.SchoolName	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.SchoolName, SUM(f.Enrollment) AS TotalEnrollment FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE s.StatusType = 'Active' AND f.LowGrade >= '1' AND f.HighGrade <= '12' GROUP BY s.SchoolName ORDER BY TotalEnrollment DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(OpenDate) AS MonthlyAverageOpenedSchools FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alameda' AND District LIKE '%Elementary School District%' AND strftime('%Y', OpenDate) = '1980'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Merged' AND DistrictType = 'Unified School District' AND County = 'Orange') * 1.0 /     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Merged' AND DistrictType = 'Elementary School District' AND County = 'Orange') AS Ratio	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT County, School, ClosedDate  FROM schools  WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'  GROUP BY County  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.Street, s.City, s.Zip  FROM satscores ss  JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode  ORDER BY ss.AvgScrMath DESC  LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.MailStreet, s.School  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE sa.AvgScrRead = (SELECT MIN(AvgScrRead) FROM satscores)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds  WHERE sa.NumGE1500 > 0 AND s.MailCity = 'Lakeport'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(NumTstTakr) AS TotalTestTakers FROM satscores WHERE cds IN (     SELECT CDSCode     FROM schools     WHERE MailCity = 'Fresno' )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.MailZip  FROM schools s  WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Avetik' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Atoian'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE County = 'Colusa' AND MailState = 'CA') * 1.0 /      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE County = 'Humboldt' AND MailState = 'CA') AS ratio	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE State = 'CA' AND StatusType = 'Active' AND City = 'San Joaquin'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone, Ext FROM schools  JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds  ORDER BY AvgScrWrite DESC  LIMIT 1 OFFSET 332	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, Phone, Ext FROM schools WHERE Zip = '95203-3704'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Website  FROM schools s  WHERE s.AdmFName1 IN ('Mike', 'Dante') AND s.AdmLName1 IN ('Larson', 'Alvarez')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Website  FROM schools  WHERE Charter = 1 AND Virtual = 'P' AND County = 'San Joaquin'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE City = 'Hickman'  AND Charter = 1  AND District LIKE '%Elementary School District%'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  WHERE County Name = 'Los Angeles'  AND Charter School (Y/N) = 0  AND Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12) < 0.0018	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.City, s.AdmFName1, s.AdmLName1, s.AdmFName2, s.AdmLName2, s.AdmFName3, s.AdmLName3  FROM schools s  WHERE s.CharterNum = '00D2'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools WHERE MailCity = 'Hickman' AND CharterNum = '00D4'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      (SUM(CASE WHEN FundingType = 'Locally funded' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS LocallyFundedPercentage FROM      schools  WHERE      County = 'Santa Clara'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE OpenDate BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2005-12-31'  AND County = 'Stanislaus'  AND FundingType = 'Directly funded'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalClosure FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' AND City = 'San Francisco' AND OpenDate < '1989-01-01' AND (ClosedDate >= '1989-01-01' OR ClosedDate IS NULL)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS ClosureCount FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' AND OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1989-12-31' AND DOCType = 'Youth Authority Facilities (CEA)' GROUP BY County ORDER BY ClosureCount DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT NCESDist FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Active' AND SOCType = 'State Special Schools'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT StatusType, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alpine' AND StatusType IN ('Active', 'Closed') AND SchoolType = 'District Community Day School' GROUP BY StatusType	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT District Code FROM schools WHERE City = 'Fresno' AND Magnet = '0'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT SUM(Enrollment (Ages 5-17)) AS Total_Enrollment FROM frpm WHERE School Name = 'California School for the Deaf-Fremont (State Special Schl)'  AND Academic Year = '2014-2015'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT FRPM_Count_Ages_5_17 FROM frpm WHERE School_Name = 'Youth Authority School' AND MailStreet = 'PO Box 1040'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT Low_Grade FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE s.NCESDist = '0613360' AND f.District_Type = 'District Special Education Consortia School'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School Name, Educational Option Type  FROM frpm  WHERE NSLP Provision Status = 'Breakfast Provision 2' AND County Code = '37'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT City FROM schools  JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode  WHERE frpm.School Type = 'High Schools (Public)'  AND frpm.NSLP Provision Status = 'Provision 2'  AND frpm.Low Grade = '9'  AND frpm.High Grade = '12'  AND frpm.County Name = 'Merced'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT f.School Name, f.Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE f.Low Grade = 'K' AND f.High Grade = '9' AND s.County = 'Los Angeles'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT GSserved, COUNT(*) as count FROM schools WHERE City = 'Adelanto' GROUP BY GSserved ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount FROM schools WHERE Virtual = 'P' AND County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara') GROUP BY County ORDER BY SchoolCount DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School Name, Latitude, School Type FROM schools ORDER BY Latitude DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT City, Low_Grade, School_Name  FROM schools  JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode  WHERE State = 'CA'  ORDER BY Latitude ASC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Low_Grade, High_Grade FROM schools ORDER BY Longitude DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT City, COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount FROM schools WHERE GSoffered = 'K-8' AND Magnet = 1 GROUP BY City	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmFName1 AS FirstName, dname AS District, COUNT(*) AS NameCount FROM schools GROUP BY AdmFName1, dname ORDER BY NameCount DESC LIMIT 2	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT f.County Code  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Alusine'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmLName1, dname, cname, sname  FROM schools  JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode  WHERE frpm.CharterSchoolNumber = '40'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3  FROM schools  WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'  AND City = 'San Bernardino'  AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'  AND (SchoolType = 'Intermediate/Middle Schools (Public)' OR SchoolType = 'Unified Schools (Public)')	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, a.AdmEmail1  FROM satscores ss  JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode  JOIN (SELECT cds, COUNT(*) AS NumTstTakr        FROM satscores        WHERE NumGE1500 > 0        GROUP BY cds        ORDER BY NumTstTakr DESC        LIMIT 1) AS max_takers ON ss.cds = max_takers.cds  JOIN schools a ON a.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE ss.NumGE1500 > 0  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
